title: John Deere Operations Center Mobile: App Review Data From Both Stores
description: Star-by-star review data for Operations Center Mobile, fetched 2026-07-12: 2.77 of 5 across 95 reviews, 27% 5-star.
answer_first: A July 12, 2026 scrape of 95 Operations Center Mobile reviews puts the combined average at 2.77 of 5 - App Store 2.89, Google Play 2.60. The split runs from 26 five-star reviews (27%) down to 36 one-star (38%). Baseline capture 2026-07-12: 95 reviews recorded; rating trends begin with the next refresh. Below, every star level is tallied per store with counts and shares.
facts: The 2026-07-12 window of 95 reviews averages 2.77 of 5 - App Store 2.89, Google Play 2.60.
Five-star reviews make up 27% of the window (26 of 95).
1-star reviews account for 38% of the window - 36 of 95.
US contributes the most reviews (95) of the 1 country feed(s) sampled.
Keyword counting across the 48 negative (1-2 star) reviews flags crashes & bugs as the top complaint, appearing in 11 of them.
Baseline established 2026-07-12 with 95 reviews; trend facts start at the next refresh.

faq.q: Does this match the rating shown in the app stores?
faq.a: Not necessarily. This window covers 95 recent reviews from 2026-07-12, while store-front ratings average the app's whole history. Treat the 2.77 of 5 here as a current-sentiment reading, not a lifetime score.

faq.q: Where do these reviews come from?
faq.a: Directly from the public review feeds of the app stores, collected in one automated run on 2026-07-12. The window holds 95 reviews for Operations Center Mobile across 2 store feed(s), tallied without edits.

faq.q: Do App Store and Google Play users score it differently?
faq.a: This capture shows App Store 2.89, Google Play 2.60 across 95 total reviews from 2026-07-12. Small per-store gaps are common in recent-review windows and can flip between refreshes.

faq.q: Does this work for other apps too?
faq.a: It does: point the source actor at any package name or App Store ID and it returns the identical structure - ratings, dates, text, helpful votes - that produced these 95 rows.
